summary: Convergence loop parity rehearsal gate delivered. run_convergence_repo_parity_rehearsal.py reads a convergence baseline manifest, synthesises an EvidenceManifest from externalCardsPath/globalCandidateCardsPath, runs backfill() in dry-run mode (no credentials required), and outputs a machine-readable parity report per table. Smoke 3/3 pass.
expectedEvidence: convergence-loop parity rehearsal runner or mode

artifacts.description: run_convergence_parity_rehearsal(baseline_path, apply=False): synthesises EvidenceManifest from baseline paths, calls backfill() in dry-run mode, returns parity report with schemaVersion, per-table parityOk, guards. --apply requires SANGUO_RAG_PG_DSN.
3 tests: dry-run-parity-ok (cards_requested=3, parityOk=True), empty-artifact-paths (ok=True, manifestFileCount=0), report-schema (all required keys present). All pass.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Parity gate compares JSONL canonical with repo mirror using count, sha256, coverage, canonicalWrites, artifactUri
acceptanceMapping.evidence: report.tables[].jsonlRowCount vs pgRequested, parityOk; artifactUri=atm://lake/...; canonicalWrites=False enforced by _synthesise_manifest

acceptanceMapping.criterion: No-write and dry-run covered with deterministic fixtures
Parity failures produce machine-readable error ledger
acceptanceMapping.evidence: report.tables[].pgErrors list; report.ok=False when any parityOk=False; guards listed in report
backfill() never modifies JSONL artifacts; report guard jsonl-canonical-export-not-modified

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0605: vector smoke linkage using externalCardsPath from baseline
C1 cutover checklist item: run parity rehearsal x3 against real convergence baseline manifests
